content.text: Delhi DSC Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 : Get complete details about Delhi DSC Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026, including recruitment updates, total vacancies, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, salary, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, answer key, result, and more.

rows.text: Dayal Singh College, Delhi University (DU) Non-Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : DSC/ADMN/NT/25/ Short Details
General Category : 1000/- OBC / EWS / Female : 800/- SC / ST / PH : 600/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Sr. Technical Assistant : Max. 35 Years Senior Assistant Post : Max. 35 Years For All Other Posts : Max. 32 Years Age Limit as on : 10/05/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
Written Exam Skill Test (If Applicable) Medical Examination Document Verification

Senior Assistant : Bachelor’s Degree, 03 Years Experience. Sr. Technical Assistant (STA) : Master’s Degree in the Relevant Subject with 02 Years Experience. Assistant : Bachelors Degree with Typing (English : 35 wpm / Hindi : 30 wpm) and 02 Years Experience. Laboratory Assistant : Bachelor’s degree and 02 Years Experience. Junior Assistant : Bachelor’s Degree and Typing (English : 35 wpm / Hindi : 30 wpm), Proficiency in Computer Operations. Library Attendant : 12th Passed, Certificate course in Library Science. Laboratory Attendant : 12th Passed with Science OR 10th Passed Skill Certificate Program in Laboratory Technology OR ITI in Relevant Trade.
